posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Our retail workflow experts are headed to Las Vegas for Shoptalk (retail conference)and would love to meet you there!

There are a few ways we can connect:

  1. Meet us at our booth (booth #707)
  2. Swing by our happy hour at our booth, March 19th at 4pm
  3. Join us for an intimate dining experience at Komodo on March 18th at 6:30pm
